claim_statement: Universe dynamics follow discrete updates N_i(t+1)=U(...) with explicit node-volume closure.
method: Symbolic formal check + executable T-V-01..T-V-04 rule-comparison suite.
pass_condition: Closed update rule is executable and one frozen v1 volume rule passes all closure gates.
fail_condition: No volume rule passes closure gates or pass requires post-hoc gate edits.
commands: .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe scripts\run_qng_p3_symbolic_validation.py --test-id QNG-T-013 --claim-id QNG-C-029 --mode formal_math --dataset-id DS-007 --derivation "03_math/derivations/qng-c-029.md" --formula-anchor "N_i(t+1) = U(N_i(t), {N_j(t)}_{j in Adj(i)}, eta_i(t))" --seed 3013 --out-dir "05_validation/evidence/artifacts/qng-t-013"

decision.note: Executable closure audit selects V-B as frozen v1 rule with 12/12 pass rates on T-V-01..T-V-04.

reproducibility.environment: Python stdlib closure suite + symbolic checker
